description: Pricing / commercial-negotiation question (T11 / PRICING_OR_COMMERCIAL_NEGOTIATION). Matched deterministically by det-price-001. Always requires human review, no automated draft is produced (pricing is human-only per CLAUDE.md rule 15), and validation_learning.pricing_interest is set to true.

input.reply_subject: Re: Outbound capacity for your sales team
input.reply_text: Thanks for reaching out. Before we go further, can you share your pricing? We'd need a quote for our team of 12 reps.
input.reply_text_snippet: Before we go further, can you share your pricing? We'd need a quote for our team of 12 reps.

validation_learning.voice_of_customer_excerpt: Thanks for reaching out. Before we go further, can you share your pricing? We'd need a quote for our team of 12 reps.

expected.notes: 'pricing' and 'quote' trigger det-price-001 ahead of det-booking-001/det-referral-001 in Section A's priority chain, so this is a deterministic match (confidence 1), not a mock-classifier guess. Section B sets classifier.validation_learning.pricing_interest=true specifically because category===PRICING_OR_COMMERCIAL_NEGOTIATION and the field was 'unknown'. No price is disclosed anywhere in the decision or draft (reply_permitted=false, draft_text=null) - any pricing reply is fully human-authored.
